assessment.approach: The challenge requires a two-step interaction: first, POST to /api/marble/session to obtain a runId and handoffKey, then PUT those values to /api/marble/confirm to complete the challenge. I will use the provided evidence to construct these two requests sequentially, ensuring the required headers are included.
evidenceUsed: The relationship between session response fields (runId, handoffKey) and confirm request body fields.
uncertainties: None, as the workflow is deterministic and fully documented in the evidence.
